---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible grainsizeR problem
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## grainsizeR Version

Please provide the package version.

## R Version

Please provide the output of `R.version.string`.

## Operating System

Please provide your operating system and version.

## Minimal Reproducible Example

Please include the smallest R example that reproduces the problem.

## Input Data Shape

Describe whether the input is long or wide, the size unit, value type, and key
columns.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

Describe what happened instead.

## Error Message

Paste the full error or warning message.

## Open-Ended Bins

Are terminal open-ended bins involved, such as `>2 mm` or `<0.0625 mm`?
